name: International Mechanical Code 2021
copyright_notice: International Mechanical Code® 2021 © 2021 International Code Council, Inc.

rules.label: Mechanical Ventilation Rate
rules.notes_template: Verify outdoor air per Table 403.3.1.1: e.g., office 5 cfm/person + 0.06 cfm/sf; classroom 10 cfm/person + 0.12 cfm/sf; assembly 5 cfm/person + 0.06 cfm/sf.
rules.citation: IMC 2021 §403 / Table 403.3.1.1 – Outdoor airflow rates per person and per area by occupancy category (aligned with ASHRAE 62.1).
rules.remediation: Compute required outdoor air using Table 403.3.1.1 with the calculated occupant load and floor area; document on mechanical schedules.

rules.label: Domestic Range Hood / Kitchen Exhaust
rules.notes_template: Verify domestic kitchen exhaust ducted to exterior; commercial kitchen hoods per §507 with Type I/II classification.
rules.citation: IMC 2021 §505 (domestic) / §507 (commercial hoods) – Range hood and kitchen exhaust requirements.
rules.remediation: Coordinate kitchen exhaust drawings with §505/§507; provide make-up air where required.

rules.label: Smoke Detectors in Air-Distribution Systems
rules.notes_template: Verify duct smoke detectors in supply systems > 2,000 cfm and return systems > 15,000 cfm, controlling shutdown of HVAC unit and signaling FACP.
rules.citation: IMC 2021 §606 – Smoke detectors in supply > 2,000 cfm and return > 15,000 cfm air-distribution systems.
rules.remediation: Specify duct-mounted smoke detectors interconnected to the FACP and unit shutdown controls.
